name: Optimized MCP — Cloudflare Code Mode
summary: Cloudflare Code Mode exposes large APIs via two tools—search() and execute()—with the model writing JavaScript against a typed SDK in a sandbox. For the full Cloudflare API surface, native MCP with full schemas was ~1.17M tokens versus ~1,000 tokens for Code Mode (~99.9% reduction). Minimal-params MCP was ~244k tokens; raw OpenAPI ~2M tokens.
methodology_notes: Cloudflare blog Feb 2026; mcp.cloudflare.com server. Pattern: dynamic discovery + server-side execution. Gateway filtering (~90% schema reduction) cited separately in Scalekit for filtered tool lists.
implications_for_gax: GAX search/doc is analogous to Code Mode search() at CLI ergonomics. GAX adds tenancy, audit_id, and policy bundle without requiring JS execution in the agent. For Cloudflare-scale APIs, GAX adapters + lazy schema remain the integration path.
corrections_to_repo_docs: research/05: mitigation table already lists Code Mode; ensure 1.17M vs 1k figures present.
